name: fom-viewer
description: Single page HTML viewer for IEEE 1516 FOM files

scripts.build: vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/fom-viewer.html && cp dist/fom-viewer.html fom-viewer.html && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['dist/fom-viewer.html', 'fom-viewer.html'].forEach(f => { if (fs.existsSync(f)) { const h = fs.readFileSync(f, 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync(f, h.replace(/new Worker/g, 'new window.Worker')); } })"
scripts.build:map: vite build --sourcemap && cp dist/index.html dist/fom-viewer.html && cp dist/fom-viewer.html fom-viewer.html && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['dist/fom-viewer.html', 'fom-viewer.html'].forEach(f => { if (fs.existsSync(f)) { const h = fs.readFileSync(f, 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync(f, h.replace(/new Worker/g, 'new window.Worker')); } })"
scripts.test:combined: npm run build && cd test && npm run test -- --combined
